text: paulos doulos iēsou christou klētos apostolos aphōrismenos eis euangelion theou
o proepēngeilato dia tōn prophētōn autou en graphais agiais
peri tou uiou autou tou genomenou ek spermatos dabid kata sarka
tou oristhentos uiou theou en dynamei kata pneuma agiōsynēs ex anastaseōs nekrōn iēsou christou tou kyriou ēmōn
di ou elabomen charin kai apostolēn eis ypakoēn pisteōs en pasin tois ethnesin yper tou onomatos autou
en ois este kai ymeis klētoi iēsou christou
pasin tois ousin en rōmē agapētois theou klētois agiois charis ymin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kyriou iēsou christou
prōton men eucharistō tō theō mou dia iēsou christou yper pantōn ymōn oti ē pistis ymōn katangelletai en olō tō kosmō
martys gar mou estin o theos ō latreuō en tō pneumati mou en tō euangeliō tou uiou autou ōs adialeiptōs mneian ymōn poioumai
pantote epi tōn proseuchōn mou deomenos eipōs ēdē pote euodōthēsomai en tō thelēmati tou theou elthein pros ymas
epipothō gar idein ymas ina ti metadō charisma ymin pneumatikon eis to stērichthēnai ymas
touto de estin symparaklēthēnai en ymin dia tēs en allēlois pisteōs ymōn te kai emou
ou thelō de ymas agnoein adelphoi oti pollakis proethemēn elthein pros ymas kai ekōlythēn achri tou deuro ina karpon tina schō kai en ymin kathōs kai en tois loipois ethnesin
ellēsin te kai barbarois sophois te kai anoētois opheiletēs eimi
outōs to kat eme prothymon kai ymin tois en rōmē euangelisasthai
ou gar epaischynomai to euangelion tou christou dynamis gar theou estin eis sōtērian panti tō pisteuonti ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
dikaiosynē gar theou en autō apokalyptetai ek pisteōs eis pistin kathōs gegraptai o de dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai
apokalyptetai gar orgē theou ap ouranou epi pasan asebeian kai adikian anthrōpōn tōn tēn alētheian en adikia katechontōn
dioti to gnōston tou theou phaneron estin en autois o gar theos autois ephanerōsen
ta gar aorata autou apo ktiseōs kosmou tois poiēmasin nooumena kathoratai ē te aidios autou dynamis kai theiotēs eis to einai autous anapologētous
dioti gnontes ton theon ouch ōs theon edoxasan ē eucharistēsan all emataiōthēsan en tois dialogismois autōn kai eskotisthē ē asynetos autōn kardia
phaskontes einai sophoi emōranthēsan
kai ēllaxan tēn doxan tou aphthartou theou en omoiōmati eikonos phthartou anthrōpou kai peteinōn kai tetrapodōn kai erpetōn
dio kai paredōken autous o theos en tais epithymiais tōn kardiōn autōn eis akatharsian tou atimazesthai ta sōmata autōn en eautois
oitines metēllaxan tēn alētheian tou theou en tō pseudei kai esebasthēsan kai elatreusan tē ktisei para ton ktisanta os estin eulogētos eis tous aiōnas amēn
dia touto paredōken autous o theos eis pathē atimias ai te gar thēleiai autōn metēllaxan tēn physikēn chrēsin eis tēn para physin

omoiōs te kai oi arsenes aphentes tēn physikēn chrēsin tēs thēleias exekauthēsan en tē orexei autōn eis allēlous arsenes en arsesin tēn aschēmosynēn katergazomenoi kai tēn antimisthian ēn edei tēs planēs autōn en eautois apolambanontes
kai kathōs ouk edokimasan ton theon echein en epignōsei paredōken autous o theos eis adokimon noun poiein ta mē kathēkonta
peplērōmenous pasē adikia porneia ponēria pleonexia kakia mestous phthonou phonou eridos dolou kakoētheias psithyristas
katalalous theostygeis ybristas yperēphanous alazonas epheuretas kakōn goneusin apeitheis
asynetous asynthetous astorgous aspondous aneleēmonas
oitines to dikaiōma tou theou epignontes oti oi ta toiauta prassontes axioi thanatou eisin ou monon auta poiousin alla kai syneudokousin tois prassousin
dio anapologētos ei ō anthrōpe pas o krinōn en ō gar krineis ton eteron seauton katakrineis ta gar auta prasseis o krinōn
oidamen de oti to krima tou theou estin kata alētheian epi tous ta toiauta prassontas
logizē de touto ō anthrōpe o krinōn tous ta toiauta prassontas kai poiōn auta oti sy ekpheuxē to krima tou theou
ē tou ploutou tēs chrēstotētos autou kai tēs anochēs kai tēs makrothymias kataphroneis agnoōn oti to chrēston tou theou eis metanoian se agei
kata de tēn sklērotēta sou kai ametanoēton kardian thēsaurizeis seautō orgēn en ēmera orgēs kai apokalypseōs dikaiokrisias tou theou
os apodōsei ekastō kata ta erga autou
tois men kath ypomonēn ergou agathou doxan kai timēn kai aphtharsian zētousin zōēn aiōnion
tois de ex eritheias kai apeithousin men tē alētheia peithomenois de tē adikia thymos kai orgē
thlipsis kai stenochōria epi pasan psychēn anthrōpou tou katergazomenou to kakon ioudaiou te prōton kai ellēnos
doxa de kai timē kai eirēnē panti tō ergazomenō to agathon ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
ou gar estin prosōpolēpsia para tō theō
osoi gar anomōs ēmarton anomōs kai apolountai kai osoi en nomō ēmarton dia nomou krithēsontai
ou gar oi akroatai tou nomou dikaioi para tō theō all oi poiētai tou nomou dikaiōthēsontai
otan gar ethnē ta mē nomon echonta physei ta tou nomou poiē outoi nomon mē echontes eautois eisin nomos
oitines endeiknyntai to ergon tou nomou grapton en tais kardiais autōn symmartyrousēs autōn tēs syneidēseōs kai metaxy allēlōn tōn logismōn katēgorountōn ē kai apologoumenōn
en ēmera ote krinei o theos ta krypta tōn anthrōpōn kata to euangelion mou dia iēsou christou
ide sy ioudaios eponomazē kai epanapauē tō nomō kai kauchasai en theō
kai ginōskeis to thelēma kai dokimazeis ta diapheronta katēchoumenos ek tou nomou
pepoithas te seauton odēgon einai typhlōn phōs tōn en skotei
paideutēn aphronōn didaskalon nēpiōn echonta tēn morphōsin tēs gnōseōs kai tēs alētheias en tō nomō
o oun didaskōn eteron seauton ou didaskeis o kēryssōn mē kleptein klepteis
o legōn mē moicheuein moicheueis o bdelyssomenos ta eidōla ierosyleis
os en nomō kauchasai dia tēs parabaseōs tou nomou ton theon atimazeis
to gar onoma tou theou di ymas blasphēmeitai en tois ethnesin kathōs gegraptai
peritomē men gar ōphelei ean nomon prassēs ean de parabatēs nomou ēs ē peritomē sou akrobystia gegonen
ean oun ē akrobystia ta dikaiōmata tou nomou phylassē ouchi ē akrobystia autou eis peritomēn logisthēsetai
kai krinei ē ek physeōs akrobystia ton nomon telousa se ton dia grammatos kai peritomēs parabatēn nomou
ou gar o en tō phanerō ioudaios estin oude ē en tō phanerō en sarki peritomē
all o en tō kryptō ioudaios kai peritomē kardias en pneumati ou grammati ou o epainos ouk ex anthrōpōn all ek tou theou
ti oun to perisson tou ioudaiou ē tis ē ōpheleia tēs peritomēs
poly kata panta tropon prōton men gar oti episteuthēsan ta logia tou theou
ti gar ei ēpistēsan tines mē ē apistia autōn tēn pistin tou theou katargēsei
mē genoito ginesthō de o theos alēthēs pas de anthrōpos pseustēs kathōs gegraptai opōs an dikaiōthēs en tois logois sou kai nikēsēs en tō krinesthai se
ei de ē adikia ēmōn theou dikaiosynēn synistēsin ti eroumen mē adikos o theos o epipherōn tēn orgēn kata anthrōpon legō
mē genoito epei pōs krinei o theos ton kosmon
ei gar ē alētheia tou theou en tō emō pseusmati eperisseusen eis tēn doxan autou ti eti kagō ōs amartōlos krinomai
kai mē kathōs blasphēmoumetha kai kathōs phasin tines ēmas legein oti poiēsōmen ta kaka ina elthē ta agatha ōn to krima endikon estin
ti oun proechometha ou pantōs proētiasametha gar ioudaious te kai ellēnas pantas yph amartian einai
kathōs gegraptai oti ouk estin dikaios oude eis
ouk estin o syniōn ouk estin o ekzētōn ton theon
pantes exeklinan ama ēchreiōthēsan ouk estin poiōn chrēstotēta ouk estin eōs enos
taphos aneōgmenos o larynx autōn tais glōssais autōn edoliousan ios aspidōn ypo ta cheilē autōn
ōn to stoma aras kai pikrias gemei
oxeis oi podes autōn ekcheai aima
syntrimma kai talaipōria en tais odois autōn
kai odon eirēnēs ouk egnōsan
ouk estin phobos theou apenanti tōn ophthalmōn autōn
oidamen de oti osa o nomos legei tois en tō nomō lalei ina pan stoma phragē kai ypodikos genētai pas o kosmos tō theō
dioti ex ergōn nomou ou dikaiōthēsetai pasa sarx enōpion autou dia gar nomou epignōsis amartias
nyni de chōris nomou dikaiosynē theou pephanerōtai martyroumenē ypo tou nomou kai tōn prophētōn
dikaiosynē de theou dia pisteōs iēsou christou eis pantas kai epi pantas tous pisteuontas ou gar estin diastolē
pantes gar ēmarton kai ysterountai tēs doxēs tou theou
dikaioumenoi dōrean tē autou chariti dia tēs apolytrōseōs tēs en christō iēsou
on proetheto o theos ilastērion dia tēs pisteōs en tō autou aimati eis endeixin tēs dikaiosynēs autou dia tēn paresin tōn progegonotōn amartēmatōn
en tē anochē tou theou pros endeixin tēs dikaiosynēs autou en tō nyn kairō eis to einai auton dikaion kai dikaiounta ton ek pisteōs iēsou
pou oun ē kauchēsis exekleisthē dia poiou nomou tōn ergōn ouchi alla dia nomou pisteōs
logizometha oun pistei dikaiousthai anthrōpon chōris ergōn nomou
ē ioudaiōn o theos monon ouchi de kai ethnōn nai kai ethnōn
epeiper eis o theos os dikaiōsei peritomēn ek pisteōs kai akrobystian dia tēs pisteōs
nomon oun katargoumen dia tēs pisteōs mē genoito alla nomon istōmen
ti oun eroumen abraam ton patera ēmōn eurēkenai kata sarka
ei gar abraam ex ergōn edikaiōthē echei kauchēma all ou pros ton theon
ti gar ē graphē legei episteusen de abraam tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn
tō de ergazomenō o misthos ou logizetai kata charin alla kata to opheilēma
tō de mē ergazomenō pisteuonti de epi ton dikaiounta ton asebē logizetai ē pistis autou eis dikaiosynēn
kathaper kai dabid legei ton makarismon tou anthrōpou ō o theos logizetai dikaiosynēn chōris ergōn
makarioi ōn aphethēsan ai anomiai kai ōn epekalyphthēsan ai amartiai
makarios anēr ō ou mē logisētai kyrios amartian
o makarismos oun outos epi tēn peritomēn ē kai epi tēn akrobystian legomen gar oti elogisthē tō abraam ē pistis eis dikaiosynēn
pōs oun elogisthē en peritomē onti ē en akrobystia ouk en peritomē all en akrobystia
kai sēmeion elaben peritomēs sphragida tēs dikaiosynēs tēs pisteōs tēs en tē akrobystia eis to einai auton patera pantōn tōn pisteuontōn di akrobystias eis to logisthēnai kai autois tēn dikaiosynēn
kai patera peritomēs tois ouk ek peritomēs monon alla kai tois stoichousin tois ichnesin tēs en tē akrobystia pisteōs tou patros ēmōn abraam
ou gar dia nomou ē epangelia tō abraam ē tō spermati autou to klēronomon auton einai tou kosmou alla dia dikaiosynēs pisteōs
ei gar oi ek nomou klēronomoi kekenōtai ē pistis kai katērgētai ē epangelia
o gar nomos orgēn katergazetai ou gar ouk estin nomos oude parabasis
dia touto ek pisteōs ina kata charin eis to einai bebaian tēn epangelian panti tō spermati ou tō ek tou nomou monon alla kai tō ek pisteōs abraam os estin patēr pantōn ēmōn
kathōs gegraptai oti patera pollōn ethnōn tetheika se katenanti ou episteusen theou tou zōopoiountos tous nekrous kai kalountos ta mē onta ōs onta
os par elpida ep elpidi episteusen eis to genesthai auton patera pollōn ethnōn kata to eirēmenon outōs estai to sperma sou
kai mē asthenēsas tē pistei ou katenoēsen to eautou sōma ēdē nenekrōmenon ekatontaetēs pou yparchōn kai tēn nekrōsin tēs mētras sarras
eis de tēn epangelian tou theou ou diekrithē tē apistia all enedynamōthē tē pistei dous doxan tō theō
kai plērophorētheis oti o epēngeltai dynatos estin kai poiēsai
dio kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn
ouk egraphē de di auton monon oti elogisthē autō
alla kai di ēmas ois mellei logizesthai tois pisteuousin epi ton egeiranta iēsoun ton kyrion ēmōn ek nekrōn
os paredothē dia ta paraptōmata ēmōn kai ēgerthē dia tēn dikaiōsin ēmōn
dikaiōthentes oun ek pisteōs eirēnēn echomen pros ton theon dia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou
di ou kai tēn prosagōgēn eschēkamen tē pistei eis tēn charin tautēn en ē estēkamen kai kauchōmetha ep elpidi tēs doxēs tou theou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmetha en tais thlipsesin eidotes oti ē thlipsis ypomonēn katergazetai
ē de ypomonē dokimēn ē de dokimē elpida
ē de elpis ou kataischynei oti ē agapē tou theou ekkechytai en tais kardiais ēmōn dia pneumatos agiou tou dothentos ēmin
eti gar christos ontōn ēmōn asthenōn kata kairon yper asebōn apethanen
molis gar yper dikaiou tis apothaneitai yper gar tou agathou tacha tis kai tolma apothanein
synistēsin de tēn eautou agapēn eis ēmas o theos oti eti amartōlōn ontōn ēmōn christos yper ēmōn apethanen
pollō oun mallon dikaiōthentes nyn en tō aimati autou sōthēsometha di autou apo tēs orgēs
ei gar echthroi ontes katēllagēmen tō theō dia tou thanatou tou uiou autou pollō mallon katallagentes sōthēsometha en tē zōē autou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmenoi en tō theō dia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou di ou nyn tēn katallagēn elabomen
dia touto ōsper di enos anthrōpou ē amartia eis ton kosmon eisēlthen kai dia tēs amartias o thanatos kai outōs eis pantas anthrōpous o thanatos diēlthen eph ō pantes ēmarton
achri gar nomou amartia ēn en kosmō amartia de ouk ellogeitai mē ontos nomou
all ebasileusen o thanatos apo adam mechri mōseōs kai epi tous mē amartēsantas epi tō omoiōmati tēs parabaseōs adam os estin typos tou mellontos

all ouch ōs to paraptōma outōs kai to charisma ei gar tō tou enos paraptōmati oi polloi apethanon pollō mallon ē charis tou theou kai ē dōrea en chariti tē tou enos anthrōpou iēsou christou eis tous pollous eperisseusen
kai ouch ōs di enos amartēsantos to dōrēma to men gar krima ex enos eis katakrima to de charisma ek pollōn paraptōmatōn eis dikaiōma

ei gar tō tou enos paraptōmati o thanatos ebasileusen dia tou enos pollō mallon oi tēn perisseian tēs charitos kai tēs dōreas tēs dikaiosynēs lambanontes en zōē basileusousin dia tou enos iēsou christou
ara oun ōs di enos paraptōmatos eis pantas anthrōpous eis katakrima outōs kai di enos dikaiōmatos eis pantas anthrōpous eis dikaiōsin zōēs
ōsper gar dia tēs parakoēs tou enos anthrōpou amartōloi katestathēsan oi polloi outōs kai dia tēs ypakoēs tou enos dikaioi katastathēsontai oi polloi
nomos de pareisēlthen ina pleonasē to paraptōma ou de epleonasen ē amartia ypereperisseusen ē charis
ina ōsper ebasileusen ē amartia en tō thanatō outōs kai ē charis basileusē dia dikaiosynēs eis zōēn aiōnion dia iēsou christou tou kyriou ēmōn
ti oun eroumen epimenoumen tē amartia ina ē charis pleonasē
mē genoito oitines apethanomen tē amartia pōs eti zēsomen en autē
ē agnoeite oti osoi ebaptisthēmen eis christon iēsoun eis ton thanaton autou ebaptisthēmen
synetaphēmen oun autō dia tou baptismatos eis ton thanaton ina ōsper ēgerthē christos ek nekrōn dia tēs doxēs tou patros outōs kai ēmeis en kainotēti zōēs peripatēsōmen
ei gar symphytoi gegonamen tō omoiōmati tou thanatou autou alla kai tēs anastaseōs esometha
touto ginōskontes oti o palaios ēmōn anthrōpos synestaurōthē ina katargēthē to sōma tēs amartias tou mēketi douleuein ēmas tē amartia
o gar apothanōn dedikaiōtai apo tēs amartias
ei de apethanomen syn christō pisteuomen oti kai syzēsomen autō
eidotes oti christos egertheis ek nekrōn ouketi apothnēskei thanatos autou ouketi kyrieuei
o gar apethanen tē amartia apethanen ephapax o de zē zē tō theō
outōs kai ymeis logizesthe eautous nekrous men einai tē amartia zōntas de tō theō en christō iēsou tō kyriō ēmōn
mē oun basileuetō ē amartia en tō thnētō ymōn sōmati eis to ypakouein autē en tais epithymiais autou
mēde paristanete ta melē ymōn opla adikias tē amartia alla parastēsate eautous tō theō ōs ek nekrōn zōntas kai ta melē ymōn opla dikaiosynēs tō theō
amartia gar ymōn ou kyrieusei ou gar este ypo nomon all ypo charin
ti oun amartēsomen oti ouk esmen ypo nomon all ypo charin mē genoito
ouk oidate oti ō paristanete eautous doulous eis ypakoēn douloi este ō ypakouete ētoi amartias eis thanaton ē ypakoēs eis dikaiosynēn
charis de tō theō oti ēte douloi tēs amartias ypēkousate de ek kardias eis on paredothēte typon didachēs
eleutherōthentes de apo tēs amartias edoulōthēte tē dikaiosynē

anthrōpinon legō dia tēn astheneian tēs sarkos ymōn ōsper gar parestēsate ta melē ymōn doula tē akatharsia kai tē anomia eis tēn anomian outōs nyn parastēsate ta melē ymōn doula tē dikaiosynē eis agiasmon
ote gar douloi ēte tēs amartias eleutheroi ēte tē dikaiosynē
tina oun karpon eichete tote eph ois nyn epaischynesthe to gar telos ekeinōn thanatos
nyni de eleutherōthentes apo tēs amartias doulōthentes de tō theō echete ton karpon ymōn eis agiasmon to de telos zōēn aiōnion
ta gar opsōnia tēs amartias thanatos to de charisma tou theou zōē aiōnios en christō iēsou tō kyriō ēmōn
ē agnoeite adelphoi ginōskousin gar nomon lalō oti o nomos kyrieuei tou anthrōpou eph oson chronon zē
ē gar ypandros gynē tō zōnti andri dedetai nomō ean de apothanē o anēr katērgētai apo tou andros
ara oun zōntos tou andros moichalis chrēmatisei ean genētai andri eterō ean de apothanē o anēr eleuthera estin apo tou nomou tou mē einai autēn moichalida genomenēn andri eterō
ōste adelphoi mou kai ymeis ethanatōthēte tō nomō dia tou sōmatos tou christou eis to genesthai ymas eterō tō ek nekrōn egerthenti ina karpophorēsōmen tō theō
ote gar ēmen en tē sarki ta pathēmata tōn amartiōn ta dia tou nomou enērgeito en tois melesin ēmōn eis to karpophorēsai tō thanatō
nyni de katērgēthēmen apo tou nomou apothanontos en ō kateichometha ōste douleuein ēmas en kainotēti pneumatos kai ou palaiotēti grammatos
ti oun eroumen o nomos amartia mē genoito alla tēn amartian ouk egnōn ei mē dia nomou tēn te gar epithymian ouk ēdein ei mē o nomos elegen ouk epithymēseis
aphormēn de labousa ē amartia dia tēs entolēs kateirgasato en emoi pasan epithymian chōris gar nomou amartia nekra
egō de ezōn chōris nomou pote elthousēs de tēs entolēs ē amartia anezēsen egō de apethanon
kai eurethē moi ē entolē ē eis zōēn autē eis thanaton
ē gar amartia aphormēn labousa dia tēs entolēs exēpatēsen me kai di autēs apekteinen
ōste o men nomos agios kai ē entolē agia kai dikaia kai agathē
to oun agathon emoi gegonen thanatos mē genoito alla ē amartia ina phanē amartia dia tou agathou moi katergazomenē thanaton ina genētai kath yperbolēn amartōlos ē amartia dia tēs entolēs
oidamen gar oti o nomos pneumatikos estin egō de sarkikos eimi pepramenos ypo tēn amartian
o gar katergazomai ou ginōskō ou gar o thelō touto prassō all o misō touto poiō
ei de o ou thelō touto poiō symphēmi tō nomō oti kalos
nyni de ouketi egō katergazomai auto all ē oikousa en emoi amartia
oida gar oti ouk oikei en emoi tout estin en tē sarki mou agathon to gar thelein parakeitai moi to de katergazesthai to kalon ouch euriskō
ou gar o thelō poiō agathon all o ou thelō kakon touto prassō
ei de o ou thelō egō touto poiō ouketi egō katergazomai auto all ē oikousa en emoi amartia
euriskō ara ton nomon tō thelonti emoi poiein to kalon oti emoi to kakon parakeitai
synēdomai gar tō nomō tou theou kata ton esō anthrōpon
blepō de eteron nomon en tois melesin mou antistrateuomenon tō nomō tou noos mou kai aichmalōtizonta me tō nomō tēs amartias tō onti en tois melesin mou
talaipōros egō anthrōpos tis me rysetai ek tou sōmatos tou thanatou toutou
eucharistō tō theō dia iēsou christou tou kyriou ēmōn ara oun autos egō tō men noi douleuō nomō theou tē de sarki nomō amartias
ouden ara nyn katakrima tois en christō iēsou mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma
o gar nomos tou pneumatos tēs zōēs en christō iēsou ēleutherōsen me apo tou nomou tēs amartias kai tou thanatou
to gar adynaton tou nomou en ō ēsthenei dia tēs sarkos o theos ton eautou uion pempsas en omoiōmati sarkos amartias kai peri amartias katekrinen tēn amartian en tē sarki
ina to dikaiōma tou nomou plērōthē en ēmin tois mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma
oi gar kata sarka ontes ta tēs sarkos phronousin oi de kata pneuma ta tou pneumatos
to gar phronēma tēs sarkos thanatos to de phronēma tou pneumatos zōē kai eirēnē
dioti to phronēma tēs sarkos echthra eis theon tō gar nomō tou theou ouch ypotassetai oude gar dynatai
oi de en sarki ontes theō aresai ou dynantai
ymeis de ouk este en sarki all en pneumati eiper pneuma theou oikei en ymin ei de tis pneuma christou ouk echei outos ouk estin autou
ei de christos en ymin to men sōma nekron di amartian to de pneuma zōē dia dikaiosynēn
ei de to pneuma tou egeirantos iēsoun ek nekrōn oikei en ymin o egeiras ton christon ek nekrōn zōopoiēsei kai ta thnēta sōmata ymōn dia tou enoikountos autou pneumatos en ymin
ara oun adelphoi opheiletai esmen ou tē sarki tou kata sarka zēn
ei gar kata sarka zēte mellete apothnēskein ei de pneumati tas praxeis tou sōmatos thanatoute zēsesthe
osoi gar pneumati theou agontai outoi eisin uioi theou
ou gar elabete pneuma douleias palin eis phobon all elabete pneuma uiothesias en ō krazomen abba o patēr
auto to pneuma symmartyrei tō pneumati ēmōn oti esmen tekna theou
ei de tekna kai klēronomoi klēronomoi men theou synklēronomoi de christou eiper sympaschomen ina kai syndoxasthōmen
logizomai gar oti ouk axia ta pathēmata tou nyn kairou pros tēn mellousan doxan apokalyphthēnai eis ēmas
ē gar apokaradokia tēs ktiseōs tēn apokalypsin tōn uiōn tou theou apekdechetai
tē gar mataiotēti ē ktisis ypetagē ouch ekousa alla dia ton ypotaxanta ep elpidi
oti kai autē ē ktisis eleutherōthēsetai apo tēs douleias tēs phthoras eis tēn eleutherian tēs doxēs tōn teknōn tou theou
oidamen gar oti pasa ē ktisis systenazei kai synōdinei achri tou nyn
ou monon de alla kai autoi tēn aparchēn tou pneumatos echontes kai ēmeis autoi en eautois stenazomen uiothesian apekdechomenoi tēn apolytrōsin tou sōmatos ēmōn
tē gar elpidi esōthēmen elpis de blepomenē ouk estin elpis o gar blepei tis ti kai elpizei
ei de o ou blepomen elpizomen di ypomonēs apekdechometha
ōsautōs de kai to pneuma synantilambanetai tais astheneiais ēmōn to gar ti proseuxōmetha katho dei ouk oidamen all auto to pneuma yperentynchanei yper ēmōn stenagmois alalētois
o de ereunōn tas kardias oiden ti to phronēma tou pneumatos oti kata theon entynchanei yper agiōn
oidamen de oti tois agapōsin ton theon panta synergei eis agathon tois kata prothesin klētois ousin
oti ous proegnō kai proōrisen symmorphous tēs eikonos tou uiou autou eis to einai auton prōtotokon en pollois adelphois
ous de proōrisen toutous kai ekalesen kai ous ekalesen toutous kai edikaiōsen ous de edikaiōsen toutous kai edoxasen
ti oun eroumen pros tauta ei o theos yper ēmōn tis kath ēmōn
os ge tou idiou uiou ouk epheisato all yper ēmōn pantōn paredōken auton pōs ouchi kai syn autō ta panta ēmin charisetai
tis enkalesei kata eklektōn theou theos o dikaiōn
tis o katakrinōn christos o apothanōn mallon de kai egertheis os kai estin en dexia tou theou os kai entynchanei yper ēmōn
tis ēmas chōrisei apo tēs agapēs tou christou thlipsis ē stenochōria ē diōgmos ē limos ē gymnotēs ē kindynos ē machaira
kathōs gegraptai oti eneka sou thanatoumetha olēn tēn ēmeran elogisthēmen ōs probata sphagēs
all en toutois pasin ypernikōmen dia tou agapēsantos ēmas
pepeismai gar oti oute thanatos oute zōē oute angeloi oute archai oute dynameis oute enestōta oute mellonta
oute ypsōma oute bathos oute tis ktisis etera dynēsetai ēmas chōrisai apo tēs agapēs tou theou tēs en christō iēsou tō kyriō ēmōn
alētheian legō en christō ou pseudomai symmartyrousēs moi tēs syneidēseōs mou en pneumati agiō
oti lypē moi estin megalē kai adialeiptos odynē tē kardia mou
ēuchomēn gar autos egō anathema einai apo tou christou yper tōn adelphōn mou tōn syngenōn mou kata sarka
oitines eisin israēlitai ōn ē uiothesia kai ē doxa kai ai diathēkai kai ē nomothesia kai ē latreia kai ai epangeliai
ōn oi pateres kai ex ōn o christos to kata sarka o ōn epi pantōn theos eulogētos eis tous aiōnas amēn
ouch oion de oti ekpeptōken o logos tou theou ou gar pantes oi ex israēl outoi israēl
oud oti eisin sperma abraam pantes tekna all en isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma
tout estin ou ta tekna tēs sarkos tauta tekna tou theou alla ta tekna tēs epangelias logizetai eis sperma
epangelias gar o logos outos kata ton kairon touton eleusomai kai estai tē sarra uios
ou monon de alla kai rebekka ex enos koitēn echousa isaak tou patros ēmōn
mēpō gar gennēthentōn mēde praxantōn ti agathon ē kakon ina ē kat eklogēn tou theou prothesis menē ouk ex ergōn all ek tou kalountos
errēthē autē oti o meizōn douleusei tō elassoni
kathōs gegraptai ton iakōb ēgapēsa ton de ēsau emisēsa
ti oun eroumen mē adikia para tō theō mē genoito
tō gar mōsē legei eleēsō on an eleō kai oikteirēsō on an oikteirō
ara oun ou tou thelontos oude tou trechontos alla tou eleountos theou
legei gar ē graphē tō pharaō oti eis auto touto exēgeira se opōs endeixōmai en soi tēn dynamin mou kai opōs diangelē to onoma mou en pasē tē gē
ara oun on thelei eleei on de thelei sklērynei
ereis oun moi ti eti memphetai tō boulēmati autou tis anthestēken
menounge ō anthrōpe sy tis ei o antapokrinomenos tō theō mē erei to plasma tō plasanti ti me epoiēsas outōs
ē ouk echei exousian o kerameus tou pēlou ek tou autou phyramatos poiēsai o men eis timēn skeuos o de eis atimian
ei de thelōn o theos endeixasthai tēn orgēn kai gnōrisai to dynaton autou ēnenken en pollē makrothymia skeuē orgēs katērtismena eis apōleian
kai ina gnōrisē ton plouton tēs doxēs autou epi skeuē eleous a proētoimasen eis doxan
ous kai ekalesen ēmas ou monon ex ioudaiōn alla kai ex ethnōn
ōs kai en tō ōsēe legei kalesō ton ou laon mou laon mou kai tēn ouk ēgapēmenēn ēgapēmenēn
kai estai en tō topō ou errēthē autois ou laos mou ymeis ekei klēthēsontai uioi theou zōntos
ēsaias de krazei yper tou israēl ean ē o arithmos tōn uiōn israēl ōs ē ammos tēs thalassēs to kataleimma sōthēsetai
logon gar syntelōn kai syntemnōn en dikaiosynē oti logon syntetmēmenon poiēsei kyrios epi tēs gēs
kai kathōs proeirēken ēsaias ei mē kyrios sabaōth enkatelipen ēmin sperma ōs sodoma an egenēthēmen kai ōs gomorra an ōmoiōthēmen
ti oun eroumen oti ethnē ta mē diōkonta dikaiosynēn katelaben dikaiosynēn dikaiosynēn de tēn ek pisteōs
israēl de diōkōn nomon dikaiosynēs eis nomon dikaiosynēs ouk ephthasen
dia ti oti ouk ek pisteōs all ōs ex ergōn nomou prosekopsan gar tō lithō tou proskommatos
kathōs gegraptai idou tithēmi en siōn lithon proskommatos kai petran skandalou kai pas o pisteuōn ep autō ou kataischynthēsetai
adelphoi ē men eudokia tēs emēs kardias kai ē deēsis ē pros ton theon yper tou israēl estin eis sōtērian
martyrō gar autois oti zēlon theou echousin all ou kat epignōsin
agnoountes gar tēn tou theou dikaiosynēn kai tēn idian dikaiosynēn zētountes stēsai tē dikaiosynē tou theou ouch ypetagēsan
telos gar nomou christos eis dikaiosynēn panti tō pisteuonti
mōsēs gar graphei tēn dikaiosynēn tēn ek tou nomou oti o poiēsas auta anthrōpos zēsetai en autois
ē de ek pisteōs dikaiosynē outōs legei mē eipēs en kardia sou tis anabēsetai eis ton ouranon tout estin christon katagagein
ē tis katabēsetai eis tēn abysson tout estin christon ek nekrōn anagagein
alla ti legei engys sou to rēma estin en tō stomati sou kai en tē kardia sou tout estin to rēma tēs pisteōs o kēryssomen
oti ean omologēsēs en tō stomati sou kyrion iēsoun kai pisteusēs en tē kardia sou oti o theos auton ēgeiren ek nekrōn sōthēsē
kardia gar pisteuetai eis dikaiosynēn stomati de omologeitai eis sōtērian
legei gar ē graphē pas o pisteuōn ep autō ou kataischynthēsetai
ou gar estin diastolē ioudaiou te kai ellēnos o gar autos kyrios pantōn ploutōn eis pantas tous epikaloumenous auton
pas gar os an epikalesētai to onoma kyriou sōthēsetai
pōs oun epikalesontai eis on ouk episteusan pōs de pisteusousin ou ouk ēkousan pōs de akousousin chōris kēryssontos
pōs de kēryxousin ean mē apostalōsin kathōs gegraptai ōs ōraioi oi podes tōn euangelizomenōn eirēnēn tōn euangelizomenōn ta agatha
all ou pantes ypēkousan tō euangeliō ēsaias gar legei kyrie tis episteusen tē akoē ēmōn
ara ē pistis ex akoēs ē de akoē dia rēmatos theou
alla legō mē ouk ēkousan menounge eis pasan tēn gēn exēlthen o phthongos autōn kai eis ta perata tēs oikoumenēs ta rēmata autōn
alla legō mē ouk egnō israēl prōtos mōsēs legei egō parazēlōsō ymas ep ouk ethnei epi ethnei asynetō parorgiō ymas
ēsaias de apotolma kai legei eurethēn tois eme mē zētousin emphanēs egenomēn tois eme mē eperōtōsin
pros de ton israēl legei olēn tēn ēmeran exepetasa tas cheiras mou pros laon apeithounta kai antilegonta
legō oun mē apōsato o theos ton laon autou mē genoito kai gar egō israēlitēs eimi ek spermatos abraam phylēs beniamin
ouk apōsato o theos ton laon autou on proegnō ē ouk oidate en ēlia ti legei ē graphē ōs entynchanei tō theō kata tou israēl legōn
kyrie tous prophētas sou apekteinan kai ta thysiastēria sou kateskapsan kagō ypeleiphthēn monos kai zētousin tēn psychēn mou
alla ti legei autō o chrēmatismos katelipon emautō eptakischilious andras oitines ouk ekampsan gony tē baal
outōs oun kai en tō nyn kairō leimma kat eklogēn charitos gegonen
ei de chariti ouketi ex ergōn epei ē charis ouketi ginetai charis ei de ex ergōn ouketi estin charis epei to ergon ouketi estin ergon
ti oun o epizētei israēl toutou ouk epetychen ē de eklogē epetychen oi de loipoi epōrōthēsan
kathōs gegraptai edōken autois o theos pneuma katanyxeōs ophthalmous tou mē blepein kai ōta tou mē akouein eōs tēs sēmeron ēmeras
kai dabid legei genēthētō ē trapeza autōn eis pagida kai eis thēran kai eis skandalon kai eis antapodoma autois
skotisthētōsan oi ophthalmoi autōn tou mē blepein kai ton nōton autōn diapantos synkampson
legō oun mē eptaisan ina pesōsin mē genoito alla tō autōn paraptōmati ē sōtēria tois ethnesin eis to parazēlōsai autous
ei de to paraptōma autōn ploutos kosmou kai to ēttēma autōn ploutos ethnōn posō mallon to plērōma autōn
ymin gar legō tois ethnesin eph oson men eimi egō ethnōn apostolos tēn diakonian mou doxazō
ei pōs parazēlōsō mou tēn sarka kai sōsō tinas ex autōn
ei gar ē apobolē autōn katallagē kosmou tis ē proslēpsis ei mē zōē ek nekrōn
ei de ē aparchē agia kai to phyrama kai ei ē riza agia kai oi kladoi
ei de tines tōn kladōn exeklasthēsan sy de agrielaios ōn enekentristhēs en autois kai synkoinōnos tēs rizēs kai tēs piotētos tēs elaias egenou
mē katakauchō tōn kladōn ei de katakauchasai ou sy tēn rizan bastazeis all ē riza se
ereis oun exeklasthēsan oi kladoi ina egō enkentristhō
kalōs tē apistia exeklasthēsan sy de tē pistei estēkas mē ypsēlophronei alla phobou
ei gar o theos tōn kata physin kladōn ouk epheisato mēpōs oude sou pheisētai
ide oun chrēstotēta kai apotomian theou epi men tous pesontas apotomian epi de se chrēstotēta ean epimeinēs tē chrēstotēti epei kai sy ekkopēsē
kai ekeinoi de ean mē epimeinōsin tē apistia enkentristhēsontai dynatos gar estin o theos palin enkentrisai autous
ei gar sy ek tēs kata physin exekopēs agrielaiou kai para physin enekentristhēs eis kallielaion posō mallon outoi oi kata physin enkentristhēsontai tē idia elaia
ou gar thelō ymas agnoein adelphoi to mystērion touto ina mē ēte par eautois phronimoi oti pōrōsis apo merous tō israēl gegonen achris ou to plērōma tōn ethnōn eiselthē
kai outōs pas israēl sōthēsetai kathōs gegraptai ēxei ek siōn o ryomenos kai apostrepsei asebeias apo iakōb
kai autē autois ē par emou diathēkē otan aphelōmai tas amartias autōn
kata men to euangelion echthroi di ymas kata de tēn eklogēn agapētoi dia tous pateras
ametamelēta gar ta charismata kai ē klēsis tou theou
ōsper gar kai ymeis pote ēpeithēsate tō theō nyn de ēleēthēte tē toutōn apeitheia
outōs kai outoi nyn ēpeithēsan tō ēmeterō eleei ina kai autoi eleēthōsin
synekleisen gar o theos tous pantas eis apeitheian ina tous pantas eleēsē
ō bathos ploutou kai sophias kai gnōseōs theou ōs anexereunēta ta krimata autou kai anexichniastoi ai odoi autou
tis gar egnō noun kyriou ē tis symboulos autou egeneto
ē tis proedōken autō kai antapodothēsetai autō
oti ex autou kai di autou kai eis auton ta panta autō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas amēn
parakalō oun ymas adelphoi dia tōn oiktirmōn tou theou parastēsai ta sōmata ymōn thysian zōsan agian euareston tō theō tēn logikēn latreian ymōn
kai mē syschēmatizesthe tō aiōni toutō alla metamorphousthe tē anakainōsei tou noos ymōn eis to dokimazein ymas ti to thelēma tou theou to agathon kai euareston kai teleion
legō gar dia tēs charitos tēs dotheisēs moi panti tō onti en ymin mē yperphronein par o dei phronein alla phronein eis to sōphronein ekastō ōs o theos emerisen metron pisteōs
kathaper gar en eni sōmati melē polla echomen ta de melē panta ou tēn autēn echei praxin
outōs oi polloi en sōma esmen en christō o de kath eis allēlōn melē
echontes de charismata kata tēn charin tēn dotheisan ēmin diaphora eite prophēteian kata tēn analogian tēs pisteōs
eite diakonian en tē diakonia eite o didaskōn en tē didaskalia
eite o parakalōn en tē paraklēsei o metadidous en aplotēti o proistamenos en spoudē o eleōn en ilarotēti
ē agapē anypokritos apostygountes to ponēron kollōmenoi tō agathō
tē philadelphia eis allēlous philostorgoi tē timē allēlous proēgoumenoi
tē spoudē mē oknēroi tō pneumati zeontes tō kyriō douleuontes
tē elpidi chairontes tē thlipsei ypomenontes tē proseuchē proskarterountes
tais chreiais tōn agiōn koinōnountes tēn philoxenian diōkontes
eulogeite tous diōkontas ymas eulogeite kai mē katarasthe
chairein meta chairontōn kai klaiein meta klaiontōn
to auto eis allēlous phronountes mē ta ypsēla phronountes alla tois tapeinois synapagomenoi mē ginesthe phronimoi par eautois
mēdeni kakon anti kakou apodidontes pronooumenoi kala enōpion pantōn anthrōpōn
ei dynaton to ex ymōn meta pantōn anthrōpōn eirēneuontes
mē eautous ekdikountes agapētoi alla dote topon tē orgē gegraptai gar emoi ekdikēsis egō antapodōsō legei kyrios
ean oun peina o echthros sou psōmize auton ean dipsa potize auton touto gar poiōn anthrakas pyros sōreuseis epi tēn kephalēn autou
mē nikō ypo tou kakou alla nika en tō agathō to kakon
pasa psychē exousiais yperechousais ypotassesthō ou gar estin exousia ei mē apo theou ai de ousai exousiai ypo tou theou tetagmenai eisin
ōste o antitassomenos tē exousia tē tou theou diatagē anthestēken oi de anthestēkotes eautois krima lēpsontai
oi gar archontes ouk eisin phobos tōn agathōn ergōn alla tōn kakōn theleis de mē phobeisthai tēn exousian to agathon poiei kai exeis epainon ex autēs
theou gar diakonos estin soi eis to agathon ean de to kakon poiēs phobou ou gar eikē tēn machairan phorei theou gar diakonos estin ekdikos eis orgēn tō to kakon prassonti
dio anankē protassesthai ou monon dia tēn orgēn alla kai dia tēn syneidēsin
dia touto gar kai phorous teleite leitourgoi gar theou eisin eis auto touto proskarterountes
apodote oun pasin tas opheilas tō ton phoron ton phoron tō to telos to telos tō ton phobon ton phobon tō tēn timēn tēn timēn
mēdeni mēden opheilete ei mē to agapan allēlous o gar agapōn ton eteron nomon peplērōken
to gar ou moicheuseis ou phoneuseis ou klepseis ou pseudomartyrēseis ouk epithymēseis kai ei tis etera entolē en toutō tō logō anakephalaioutai en tō agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs eauton
ē agapē tō plēsion kakon ouk ergazetai plērōma oun nomou ē agapē
kai touto eidotes ton kairon oti ōra ēmas ēdē ex ypnou egerthēnai nyn gar engyteron ēmōn ē sōtēria ē ote episteusamen
ē nyx proekopsen ē de ēmera ēngiken apothōmetha oun ta erga tou skotous kai endysōmetha ta opla tou phōtos
ōs en ēmera euschēmonōs peripatēsōmen mē kōmois kai methais mē koitais kai aselgeiais mē eridi kai zēlō
all endysasthe ton kyrion iēsoun christon kai tēs sarkos pronoian mē poieisthe eis epithymias
ton de asthenounta tē pistei proslambanesthe mē eis diakriseis dialogismōn
os men pisteuei phagein panta o de asthenōn lachana esthiei
o esthiōn ton mē esthionta mē exoutheneitō kai o mē esthiōn ton esthionta mē krinetō o theos gar auton proselabeto
sy tis ei o krinōn allotrion oiketēn tō idiō kyriō stēkei ē piptei stathēsetai de dynatos gar estin o theos stēsai auton
os men krinei ēmeran par ēmeran os de krinei pasan ēmeran ekastos en tō idiō noi plērophoreisthō
o phronōn tēn ēmeran kyriō phronei kai o mē phronōn tēn ēmeran kyriō ou phronei o esthiōn kyriō esthiei eucharistei gar tō theō kai o mē esthiōn kyriō ouk esthiei kai eucharistei tō theō
oudeis gar ēmōn eautō zē kai oudeis eautō apothnēskei
ean te gar zōmen tō kyriō zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tō kyriō apothnēskomen ean te oun zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tou kyriou esmen
eis touto gar christos kai apethanen kai anestē kai anezēsen ina kai nekrōn kai zōntōn kyrieusē
sy de ti krineis ton adelphon sou ē kai sy ti exoutheneis ton adelphon sou pantes gar parastēsometha tō bēmati tou christou
gegraptai gar zō egō legei kyrios oti emoi kampsei pan gony kai pasa glōssa exomologēsetai tō theō
ara oun ekastos ēmōn peri eautou logon dōsei tō theō
mēketi oun allēlous krinōmen alla touto krinate mallon to mē tithenai proskomma tō adelphō ē skandalon
oida kai pepeismai en kyriō iēsou oti ouden koinon di eautou ei mē tō logizomenō ti koinon einai ekeinō koinon
ei de dia brōma o adelphos sou lypeitai ouketi kata agapēn peripateis mē tō brōmati sou ekeinon apollye yper ou christos apethanen
mē blasphēmeisthō oun ymōn to agathon
ou gar estin ē basileia tou theou brōsis kai posis alla dikaiosynē kai eirēnē kai chara en pneumati agiō
o gar en toutois douleuōn tō christō euarestos tō theō kai dokimos tois anthrōpois
ara oun ta tēs eirēnēs diōkōmen kai ta tēs oikodomēs tēs eis allēlous
mē eneken brōmatos katalye to ergon tou theou panta men kathara alla kakon tō anthrōpō tō dia proskommatos esthionti
kalon to mē phagein krea mēde piein oinon mēde en ō o adelphos sou proskoptei ē skandalizetai ē asthenei
sy pistin echeis kata sauton eche enōpion tou theou makarios o mē krinōn eauton en ō dokimazei
o de diakrinomenos ean phagē katakekritai oti ouk ek pisteōs pan de o ouk ek pisteōs amartia estin
opheilomen de ēmeis oi dynatoi ta asthenēmata tōn adynatōn bastazein kai mē eautois areskein
ekastos gar ēmōn tō plēsion aresketō eis to agathon pros oikodomēn
kai gar o christos ouch eautō ēresen alla kathōs gegraptai oi oneidismoi tōn oneidizontōn se epepeson ep eme
osa gar proegraphē eis tēn ēmeteran didaskalian proegraphē ina dia tēs ypomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs tōn graphōn tēn elpida echōmen
o de theos tēs ypomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs dōē ymin to auto phronein en allēlois kata christon iēsoun
ina omothymadon en eni stomati doxazēte ton theon kai patera tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou
dio proslambanesthe allēlous kathōs kai o christos proselabeto ēmas eis doxan theou
legō de iēsoun christon diakonon gegenēsthai peritomēs yper alētheias theou eis to bebaiōsai tas epangelias tōn paterōn
ta de ethnē yper eleous doxasai ton theon kathōs gegraptai dia touto exomologēsomai soi en ethnesin kai tō onomati sou psalō
kai palin legei euphranthēte ethnē meta tou laou autou
kai palin aineite ton kyrion panta ta ethnē kai epainesate auton pantes oi laoi
kai palin ēsaias legei estai ē riza tou iessai kai o anistamenos archein ethnōn ep autō ethnē elpiousin
o de theos tēs elpidos plērōsai ymas pasēs charas kai eirēnēs en tō pisteuein eis to perisseuein ymas en tē elpidi en dynamei pneumatos agiou
pepeismai de adelphoi mou kai autos egō peri ymōn oti kai autoi mestoi este agathōsynēs peplērōmenoi pasēs gnōseōs dynamenoi kai allēlous nouthetein
tolmēroteron de egrapsa ymin adelphoi apo merous ōs epanamimnēskōn ymas dia tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi ypo tou theou
eis to einai me leitourgon iēsou christou eis ta ethnē ierourgounta to euangelion tou theou ina genētai ē prosphora tōn ethnōn euprosdektos ēgiasmenē en pneumati agiō
echō oun kauchēsin en christō iēsou ta pros theon
ou gar tolmēsō lalein ti ōn ou kateirgasato christos di emou eis ypakoēn ethnōn logō kai ergō
en dynamei sēmeiōn kai teratōn en dynamei pneumatos theou ōste me apo ierousalēm kai kyklō mechri tou illyrikou peplērōkenai to euangelion tou christou
outōs de philotimoumenon euangelizesthai ouch opou ōnomasthē christos ina mē ep allotrion themelion oikodomō
alla kathōs gegraptai ois ouk anēngelē peri autou opsontai kai oi ouk akēkoasin synēsousin
dio kai enekoptomēn ta polla tou elthein pros ymas
nyni de mēketi topon echōn en tois klimasin toutois epipothian de echōn tou elthein pros ymas apo pollōn etōn
ōs ean poreuōmai eis tēn spanian eleusomai pros ymas elpizō gar diaporeuomenos theasasthai ymas kai yph ymōn propemphthēnai ekei ean ymōn prōton apo merous emplēsthō
nyni de poreuomai eis ierousalēm diakonōn tois agiois
eudokēsan gar makedonia kai achaia koinōnian tina poiēsasthai eis tous ptōchous tōn agiōn tōn en ierousalēm
eudokēsan gar kai opheiletai autōn eisin ei gar tois pneumatikois autōn ekoinōnēsan ta ethnē opheilousin kai en tois sarkikois leitourgēsai autois
touto oun epitelesas kai sphragisamenos autois ton karpon touton apeleusomai di ymōn eis tēn spanian
oida de oti erchomenos pros ymas en plērōmati eulogias tou euangeliou tou christou eleusomai
parakalō de ymas adelphoi dia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai dia tēs agapēs tou pneumatos synagōnisasthai moi en tais proseuchais yper emou pros ton theon
ina rysthō apo tōn apeithountōn en tē ioudaia kai ina ē diakonia mou ē eis ierousalēm euprosdektos genētai tois agiois
ina en chara elthō pros ymas dia thelēmatos theou kai synanapausōmai ymin
o de theos tēs eirēnēs meta pantōn ymōn amēn
synistēmi de ymin phoibēn tēn adelphēn ēmōn ousan diakonon tēs ekklēsias tēs en kenchreais
ina autēn prosdexēsthe en kyriō axiōs tōn agiōn kai parastēte autē en ō an ymōn chrēzē pragmati kai gar autē prostatis pollōn egenēthē kai autou emou
aspasasthe priskillan kai akylan tous synergous mou en christō iēsou
oitines yper tēs psychēs mou ton eautōn trachēlon ypethēkan ois ouk egō monos eucharistō alla kai pasai ai ekklēsiai tōn ethnōn
kai tēn kat oikon autōn ekklēsian aspasasthe epaineton ton agapēton mou os estin aparchē tēs achaias eis christon
aspasasthe mariam ētis polla ekopiasen eis ēmas
aspasasthe andronikon kai iounian tous syngeneis mou kai synaichmalōtous mou oitines eisin episēmoi en tois apostolois oi kai pro emou gegonasin en christō
aspasasthe amplian ton agapēton mou en kyriō
aspasasthe ourbanon ton synergon ēmōn en christō kai stachyn ton agapēton mou
aspasasthe apellēn ton dokimon en christō aspasasthe tous ek tōn aristoboulou
aspasasthe ērodiōna ton syngenē mou aspasasthe tous ek tōn narkissou tous ontas en kyriō
aspasasthe tryphainan kai tryphōsan tas kopiōsas en kyriō aspasasthe persida tēn agapētēn ētis polla ekopiasen en kyriō
aspasasthe rouphon ton eklekton en kyriō kai tēn mētera autou kai emou
aspasasthe asynkriton phlegonta erman patroban ermēn kai tous syn autois adelphous
aspasasthe philologon kai ioulian nērea kai tēn adelphēn autou kai olympan kai tous syn autois pantas agious
aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agiō aspazontai ymas ai ekklēsiai tou christou
parakalō de ymas adelphoi skopein tous tas dichostasias kai ta skandala para tēn didachēn ēn ymeis emathete poiountas kai ekklinate ap autōn
oi gar toioutoi tō kyriō ēmōn iēsou christō ou douleuousin alla tē eautōn koilia kai dia tēs chrēstologias kai eulogias exapatōsin tas kardias tōn akakōn
ē gar ymōn ypakoē eis pantas aphiketo chairō oun to eph ymin thelō de ymas sophous men einai eis to agathon akeraious de eis to kakon
o de theos tēs eirēnēs syntripsei ton satanan ypo tous podas ymōn en tachei ē charis tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meth ymōn amēn
aspazontai ymas timotheos o synergos mou kai loukios kai iasōn kai sōsipatros oi syngeneis mou
aspazomai ymas egō tertios o grapsas tēn epistolēn en kyriō
aspazetai ymas gaios o xenos mou kai tēs ekklēsias olēs aspazetai ymas erastos o oikonomos tēs poleōs kai kouartos o adelphos
ē charis tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta pantōn ymōn amēn
tō de dynamenō ymas stērixai kata to euangelion mou kai to kērygma iēsou christou kata apokalypsin mystēriou chronois aiōniois sesigēmenou
phanerōthentos de nyn dia te graphōn prophētikōn kat epitagēn tou aiōniou theou eis ypakoēn pisteōs eis panta ta ethnē gnōristhentos
monō sophō theō dia iēsou christou ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas amēn [pros rōmaious egraphē apo korinthou dia phoibēs tēs diakonou tēs en kenchreais ekklēsias]
